name: Slack
description: Cloud-based team messaging and collaboration platform developed by Salesforce.

years.notes: Original hashtag (octothorpe) mark used 2013–2018. Four rounded rectangular bars in a # shape, rotated 15°. Geometrically reconstructed from reference PNG.
Redesign by Pentagram (Michael Bierut) announced January 16, 2019. Four-color speech-bubble lozenge mark.
